unresolved: Whether each CALL SITE must actually be edited depends on the (unspecified) nature of the signature change: an added/removed/reordered parameter forces every call site and override; a source-compatible change (e.g. widening a param type) could leave call sites untouched. I included all direct `.serialize(value, gen, provider)` call sites to be safe.

Excluded as DIFFERENT methods (not the changing one): JsonSerializable.serialize(JsonGenerator,SerializerProvider) 2-arg impls (node/*: BaseJsonNode/ObjectNode/ArrayNode/POJONode/TextNode/etc., type/TypeBase, util/RawValue, util/JSONPObject+JSONWrappedObject as JsonSerializable, node/InternalNodeMapper), serializeWithType (4-arg), ObjectWriter.Prefetch.serialize(gen,value,prov), TokenBuffer.serialize(gen), and the test helper DateSerializationTest.serialize(mapper/writer,date,expected) — flag in case the intended change actually targets the JsonSerializable hierarchy instead.
